case_title: MONTANA, MAY vs. ROQUE, MARIO et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTANA, MAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROQUE, MARIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 200 ELLSWORTH STREET AND GARAGE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT ROQUE, MARIO
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROQUE, MARIO
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT ROQUE, MARIO
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTANA, MAY AS TO DEFENDANT ROQUE, MARIO DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTANA, MAY
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTANA, MAY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $35.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTANA, MAY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTANA, MAY SERVED JUN-22-1998, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROQUE, MARIO
